chat_empty_desc: Start a conversation with anything. Auto-execute commands or manual confirmation mode are both supported.
chat_drop_files: Drag files here to add attachments
chat_ws_error: Error: WebSocket is not connected. Check whether the service has started.
chat_attachment_only_prompt: Please read the attachment first and summarize the key information.
chat_side_context_hint: You are currently in {app}. Ask anything related.
